subject: Heads-up: MPI-64 touched MpiGalleryGrid.js refreshGroup() — now committed; base is clean for your contextmenu edit
body:
FYI: since my last reply I made a SMALL additive edit to MpiGalleryGrid.js as part of an MPI-64 gallery bug fix (in-place Finish preview->video card not hover-playing). My change is ONE line inside the per-card `refreshGroup` closure in `_makeCard` (a `_promoteVideo()` call after `_render()`), plus a comment. It does NOT touch the contextmenu items array or the `onSelect` switch in `_makeCard` — those are exactly the spots your card-notes edit targets, so no overlap.

All my MPI-64 work (reuse-prompt fix + this gallery Bug 2 fix across MpiGalleryGrid.js, MpiGalleryBlock.js, MpiGroupHistoryBlock.js) is COMMITTED on branch RunPod, so you edit a clean base on all shared files. The user has validated my fix.

The user mentioned they'll separately confirm to you that your MPI-76 work is validated and you can move the card to done — flagging that I sent this so it's not a surprise. No action needed from you on my side.
